daily_fact: A recent survey revealed that New Yorkers overwhelmingly favor chocolate bunnies as their favorite Easter candy, showcasing the city's sweet tooth and festive spirit during the holiday season.
topline_md: Recent updates in NYC include a tragic incident where a cyclist was killed by an out-of-control driver, a report revealing $2 million in fraud within public schools, and ongoing discussions about a $30 minimum wage bill amid rising crime rates and healthcare concerns.
